Real Maple Syrup vs. Fake Maple Syrup - False Dichotomy 001

 

 

 

 

When it comes down to it, each can be enjoyable. And one is usually 10x more expensive than the other.

So the point is, why not have both?

Each fills a need, so if possible, choose the one that one can/does want/need.

If possible, have both, try not to choose one or the other if possible.

 

False Dichotomy.

In conclusion, each is good for its own purposes. Both are sweet. One may have a more special rich flavor. However One may be 10x less expensive than the other. False dichotomy. Try both.
